subject: New Request: Python Developer
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

NordHealth (healthcare) is looking for a senior Python Developer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Python
• AWS
• Docker
• Oracle

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
